hotel_name: Khách sạn A25 Premium - 29 Thác Bạc - Sapa (A25 Premium  Hotel - 29 Thác Bạc - Sapa )

reviews.title: Avoid if you can
reviews.text: Avoid if you can, or choose if you are on a very strict budget.
reviews.response: First of all, we sincerely thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. We are truly sorry to learn that your stay did not meet your expectations. This is certainly not the level of service we aim to provide to our guests. We would greatly appreciate the opportunity to receive more detailed feedback regarding the aspects that left you dissatisfied, so that we can carefully review and improve our services moving forward. Your comments are extremely valuable to us. We hope to have the chance to welcome you back in the future and provide you with a much more positive experience.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Bed was comfortable
reviews.negatives: It's not the hotel shown in the pictures

reviews.title: Stealing from customers
reviews.text:
We booked a 2 night double room inside this hotel. The room was nice but what made this whole trip not worth it was what happened when we left. We forgot one apple iphone charger inside the room. We left at 9am for a trekking, texted them at 1pm about the charger forgotten inside the room. So, before the next arrival of customers (checkin at 2pm). They told us they would give it back to us once we are back at the hotel to retrieve our luggage we left for the day. 

Short after our arrival, they told us there was no charger inside the room and the cleaning staff didnt find it. Which is not possible considering we knew where we left it and we didnt take it with us. They assured us they would look at the cctv and find it with their staff, which they didnt do. 

Its a shame to leave a bad review when the whole experience was great, only to a lack of honesty and trust to their staff

reviews.title: Decent hotel
reviews.positives: Location
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.text: Room given next to Renovation is ongoing with loud construction noise. Later reception himself called request to change room. We rejected as already unpack and settle in. Should have given us a better room. Do Note all rooms on the whole 2 floor is empty except ours and it is eeire
reviews.response:
Dear Guest,
Thank you for your feedback. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience caused by the ongoing renovation noise during your stay. We understand your concern regarding the room assignment and will take your comments into consideration to improve room allocation in the future. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide a more comfortable experience.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Clean and accessible
reviews.negatives: Nothing

reviews.title: Would not recommend
reviews.text:
The rooms were very basic and we were extremely unhappy with the breakfast situation. As vegetarians we mentioned to them a day before to make arrangements however during breakfast, at 8am fruits are over, by 9am there is barely anything for us to eat and all they say is that it's over.

No one takes responsibilities. 

Would recommend to look for better places.
reviews.response: We are very sorry to hear that your experience did not meet your expectations, particularly regarding the room and breakfast. We apologize that the basic room caused discomfort, and that the breakfast arrangements for vegetarian guests were not adequately prepared as requested. The fact that fruits ran out early and there were very few options left by 9 a.m. was a serious oversight on our part, and we regret that our staff did not proactively address the situation or take responsibility promptly. We will review our breakfast service procedures to ensure that guests with special dietary needs are properly accommodated and improve the monitoring of food availability so that items do not run out too early. Your feedback is invaluable in helping us enhance our service quality. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future with a better-prepared and more comfortable experience.

reviews.title: Come for the views - return for the staff
reviews.positives:
It was wonderful to wake up in the morning, stand on our balcony, and see the fog blanketing the valley behind the hotel. If only for that, this place would be worth it. But we could also see the monorail train on its way to and from the Cable Car station to Fansipan. And we could also hear the roosters each morning as well. It was an idyllic location for our stay in Sapa. Make sure to book the mountain view room. 

The hotel is also well located, as it was a short walk uphill to a good restaurant, and downhill to several coffee spots and spas, including our favorite Ruby Spa. It is also an easy walk to the Sapa train station building, and lots of restaurants, and the Sapa Lake in the downtown area. And we caught an inexpensive Grab ride back up the hill to our hotel each time. 

The staff at A25 is outstanding. The front desk folks speak good English, and they helped us sort a few logistical issues during our stay. They are also very friendly, as is the young doorman, who was the James Brown of this hotel (the hardest working man in show business). 

Overall, we had a great 5 days in Sapa, and our stay at A25 was a big part of that. We would gladly return here.
reviews.negatives: The breakfast is complimentary, so we managed expectations. We are vegetarians, so it can be difficult to find offerings at buffets. Normally we found enough to eat each morning.

reviews.title: Great Location , Clean , Helpful Staff
reviews.text: Excellent place to stay , the staff is helpful especially this guy , Nyugen he helped us so much.
reviews.response: Dear Guest, we are very pleased that you have taken your valuable time to share your review during your stay at the hotel. We are very grateful and take that as a great motivation to improve the quality of our services. We hope that there will be more opportunities to welcome you back. In addition, we see that there seems to be a misunderstanding about the score. Please check the score out of 10, we see that you are very satisfied but only rate 4.8/10, maybe you misunderstood the total score is 4.8/5. Thank you very much.

reviews.title: Exceptional experience with great locality
reviews.positives:
The hotel had taken care of every small thing you need for daily chores (iron, sewing needles, nail cutter, bath gown etc).
The room size and bed size was very good for deluxe room. We were a family of 3 however 4 people can easily be accommodated in the twin bed.
The staff were exceptionally polite and supportive.
Indian veg food was also available.
Location is just 5-8 mins walking distance from the SAPA centre and mono rail station.
reviews.negatives: The veg food was kept along with the non-veg food and spill over of non veg food can be seen in the veg food. Precaution should have been taken to separate out the veg and non veg food in the buffet breakfast.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Very good staff, facilities but our room is too small.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for choosing to stay with us and for sharing your kind feedback. 

  

We are delighted to know that you were satisfied with our staff and facilities. At the same time, we sincerely apologize that the room size did not fully meet your expectations. For your future stays, please feel free to contact us in advance so we can recommend a more suitable room type with a larger space for your comfort. 

  

We truly appreciate your comments and look forward to welcoming you again for an even better experience next time.

reviews.title: Very recommendable.
reviews.positives: Very recommendable.
reviews.negatives: Everything. The rooms, the staff and the food in the Buffet during breakfast.

reviews.title: For improvement.
reviews.text: Good location and value for money however, cleaning of rooms are not done timely. Hotel might be understaffed.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to share your feedback. We’re delighted to hear that you found our location convenient and the stay worth the value. We also sincerely apologize for the delay in housekeeping service. During peak times, staffing limitations may affect our schedule, but please rest assured that we are working to improve this and ensure timely and professional room cleaning moving forward. We look forward to welcoming you back in the future for an even better experience.
Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn bạn đã lựa chọn lưu trú tại khách sạn và dành thời gian phản hồi. Rất vui khi biết rằng bạn đánh giá cao vị trí và thấy dịch vụ tương xứng với chi phí. Chúng tôi cũng xin lỗi vì sự chậm trễ trong việc dọn phòng, và ghi nhận phản ánh của bạn. Trong thời gian cao điểm, có thể khâu phục vụ phòng bị ảnh hưởng phần nào do hạn chế về nhân sự, tuy nhiên chúng tôi đang nỗ lực điều chỉnh để đảm bảo dịch vụ được thực hiện đúng giờ và chuyên ngh

reviews.title: The firmness of the bed wasn’t a big issue since we spent most of our time outside. What really stood out was how friend
reviews.positives: I really appreciated how clean the facilities were, especially the bedroom. It made the stay feel comfortable and well-maintained.
reviews.negatives: We booked a room with two beds and a mountain view, but unfortunately, we were placed on the first floor, and our view was blocked. One of the beds was also quite firm, which made it less comfortable to sleep on.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: It was fine overall

reviews.title: 1st Sapa trip and definitely not the last
reviews.positives: Hotel is a walking distance to town with many coffee shops and eateries. It has a nice Mountain View and exceptional clean. Hotel staff service and hospitality is fantastic.  They are very accommodating. It was a fabulous trip for us.
reviews.negatives: None

reviews.title: Good value for your money
reviews.text: Seems to me that this hotel is still new. Clean rooms, around 6 mins to Sapa Square. Cheap rental. Accomodating staff, even had restaurant recommendations for local food. No issue encountered. Highly recommended. Wish they have a weighing scale to check baggage for those leaving to airport.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for your wonderful review and for recommending our hotel. We are delighted to know that you found great value in your stay and appreciated our clean rooms, convenient location, and the friendliness of our staff. Your kind words truly encourage our team. 

  

We also sincerely appreciate your helpful suggestion regarding the weighing scale for luggage. Please kindly note that we do have a weighing scale available at the lobby, and our staff would be more than happy to assist you anytime.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Staff accommodated late check in and were very helpful. Room was clean and comfortable. Shower had very warm water with good pressure. Was great to recover here after the Ha giang loop.
reviews.negatives: Was a bit of a walk from central sapa, but do-able.

reviews.title: Solid Hotel in Sapa with minor drawbacks
reviews.text:
Sapa is more expensive than other places in Vietnam and so less value in hotels in the town than elsewhere.  The A25 was a good hotel and my room was clean spacious and modern. The walls don’t have much noise insulation but it wasn’t particularly noisy while I stayed. Breakfast was very good with a lot of choices.  

I thought the staff tried hard but a few small issues. I arrived at close to 5pm but had to wait 15 minutes until my room was ready.   I was not exactly early and I had advised of my arrival time  (4pm). 

Additionally while it is routine for most hotels in Vietnam to help with bus and tour bookings, A25 didn’t do that. I had to book my bus to Ha Giang  through another hotel.  The cost was ok for Sapa but not a  strong value compared to other hotels I stayed at throughout Vietnam . So a solid hotel  with a nice room and breakfast but lacking in a few things as mentioned.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for choosing to stay at our hotel in Sa Pa and for taking the time to share your detailed feedback. 

  

We are delighted to know that you enjoyed the cleanliness, spacious and modern design of the room, as well as our breakfast selection. Your kind comments about our staff’s efforts are also greatly appreciated and will certainly be shared with the team. 

  

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced upon arrival. Although we always strive to prepare rooms as quickly as possible, there may occasionally be short waiting times during busy periods. We truly appreciate your patience and understanding. 

  

Regarding your comment about assistance with bus and tour bookings, thank you for bringing this to our attention. Your feedback is very valuable, and we will review our services to see how we can better support guests with travel arrangements in the future. 

  

Once again, thank you for your balanced and thoughtful review. Yo

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Cerca del centro
reviews.negatives: La cama era muy dura. Cuando llegamos no habia nadie en recepcion y nos metimos en una habitacion cualquiera porque llegabamos cansadas. No teniamos agua caliente en la habitacion y en el desayuno solo habia Pho, pan de molde, cafe y te.

reviews.title: Nice, clean space
reviews.text: The staffs were very helpful. The room is spacious. Breasfast was ok. The location a bit far from city center but accessible via grab or taxi. Only problem with the room is the bath tub leaking on the floor. The floor gets wet every after use and water got stuck on the corner. No mountain view though vs our booked room. Worth to check system on housekeeping, they forgot to clean our room twice even though the "make up room" sign switched on. Other than that, our stay was good and relaxing.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback about your stay. We are pleased to hear that you found our staff helpful, the room spacious, and your overall stay relaxing. 

  

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you experienced, including the leaking bathtub, the room not matching the booked mountain-view category, and the housekeeping oversights when your room was not serviced despite the “Make Up Room” sign being displayed. These matters are taken very seriously, and we will review our maintenance procedures, booking system, and housekeeping operations to ensure such issues do not occur again. 

  

We also appreciate your comments regarding our location and will continue to provide better assistance with transportation options for our guests. 

  

We truly hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide a more seamless and enjoyable experience.

reviews.title: Incómodo y caro
reviews.positives: Hotel a 10 minutos andando del centro.
reviews.negatives:
Las camas son muy duras e impide descansar bien. El desayuno no pudimos probarlo porque la señora que tenía que hacerlo se durmió y llegó tarde.. 🥲
En recepción no hablan casi inglés y se hizo un poco complicado entenderse, pero al final lo logramos!

reviews.title: Near to halal restaurant
reviews.text: Very cozy with family of 4. Very close by with halal restaurants, and walking distant towards the main area.
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. reviews.negatives:

Nos dieron una habitación con humedad y con un panel delante que no tenía vistas,pedí que por favor nos cambiaran y lo hicieron. 
Las fotos no se corresponden con lo que ofrecen.

reviews.title: Catastrophique et innaceptable.
reviews.positives: La vue
reviews.negatives: Hôtel insalubre, humidité, pas de ménage de fait : rasoir oublié dans la douche, cheveux au sol dans toute la chambre. Mauvaise literie, l'hotel est délabré, laissé à l'abandon, petit déjeuner inexistant car pas assez de nourriture pour tout le monde. J'ai demandé à voir le manager mais il était à Saïgon;  Je devais faire 3 nuits mais n'en ai fait qu'une, je suis parti.

reviews.title: Had a really good night at A25
reviews.text: We had a great stay, Sapa is very damp and wet, but this hotel did a decent job keeping the room dry, we were very happy after a colder few nights in Tavan.

Le personnel ne parlait pas anglais et pas arrangeant. 
Le restaurant est au sous au sol, pas très joli

Rapport/qualité prix pas bon pour Sapa

 Die Handtücher haben eine sehr gute Qualität. Das Bett und die Bettwäsche ebenfalls.

reviews.response: Thank you for sharing your experience at our hotel. We are pleased to hear that you appreciated the quality of the towels, bed, and bedding, as well as the cleanliness of the room according to European standards. We also note your comment that the room was smaller than shown in the photos and will review how we present room images on our website to reflect reality more accurately. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you again, so you can continue to enjoy a comfortable and quality stay at our hotel.

reviews.title: Value for money hotel
reviews.text: The best thing was the attitude of the staff. They try hard to help with anything. There were occasionally musty smells from the bedding or towels. I mentioned it and they replaced them. Considering the price, it seems about right. The staff were friendly, so I stayed for the 4 nights I booked.
reviews.response:
고객님께, 
저희 호텔을 선택해 주시고 소중한 후기를 남겨주셔서 진심으로 감사드립니다. 
투숙 기간 동안 직원들의 친절함과 적극적인 도움에 만족하셨다니 매우 기쁘게 생각합니다. 이는 저희가 항상 중요하게 생각하는 부분입니다. 
또한, 객실의 침구 및 수건과 관련하여 불편을 드린 점 진심으로 사과드립니다. 이는 저희가 지향하는 서비스 기준에 미치지 못한 부분입니다. 현재 객실 청결 및 세탁, 점검 절차를 전반적으로 재검토하고 있으며, 동일한 문제가 재발하지 않도록 개선하고 있습니다. 
그럼에도 불구하고 4박 동안 저희 호텔을 이용해 주신 점 깊이 감사드립니다. 앞으로 더욱 향상된 서비스로 고객님께 더 나은 경험을 제공해 드릴 수 있기를 바랍니다. 
다시 한번 감사드리며, 가까운 시일 내에 다시 모실 수 있기를 기대합니다. 
감사합니다.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Un des meilleurs hôtels qu'on a pu faire au Vietnam au niveau rapport qualité/prix. Chambre très confortable, assez grande, très bien entretenue et très propre. La décoration avec la fausse cheminée est très sympa. Plein de petits détails agréables (produits de salle de bain, etc.) et le personnel est très gentil. Je recommande largement !

reviews.title: Budget hotel for one night stay.
reviews.text: Excellent budget hotel with exceptional staff. Very helpful. My only complain is that the pillows kind of like has a smell on it. But it's not a big deal as we just stayed a night.  But they have all the amenities we needed. Location wise, it's not too bad. They have discount on grab.
reviews.response: Thank you very much for sharing your experience with us. We are delighted to hear that you found our hotel to be a great value and appreciated the friendliness and helpfulness of our staff. We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience regarding the pillow odor. Your feedback has been shared with our housekeeping team to ensure better quality control moving forward. We truly appreciate your understanding, especially as your stay was brief. Thank you again for your kind comments. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back in the future.

reviews.title: Nicht empfehlenswert.
reviews.positives: Gute Lage und schneller Check-In.
reviews.negatives: Im Bad gab es anscheinend einen Rohrbruch. Es hat von der Decke sehr viel Wasser getropft, sodass der Boden komplett unter Wasser stand. Das Personal an der Rezeption hat zu uns gesagt, dass man da nichts machen kann. Zusätzlich ist das Bett wie ein Holzbrett. Schimmel überall zu sehen. Die Tür im Bad lässt sich nicht richtig verschließen. Haartrockner hat einen Wackelkontakt und konnte nicht verwendet werden. Wasser in der Dusche schlecht regulierbar. Es war sehr warm und wir mussten mit Klimaanlage schlafen. Die Klimaanlage war sehr laut. Check-Out hat sehr lange gedauert. Die Frau, die an der Rezeption arbeitet hat anscheinend in der Lobby geschlafen und war bei unserem Check-Out müde und sehr langsam.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Booked for three nights, location is in the center of town which provides easy access to multiple places. Rooms have the required amenities, however, facility cleanliness needs some work. Staff are helpful and approachable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Insgesamt waren wir sehr zufrieden.
Das Zimmer war klein, aber sauber, bequem und sehr schön eingerichtet. Das Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis war ausgezeichnet. Das Personal war jederzeit höflich, zuvorkommend und hilfsbereit.

Die Innenstadt ist in etwa 7 Minuten zu Fuß erreichbar. Wenn man die Straße hinunterläuft, findet man einige einheimische Geschäfte und Restaurants, in denen man gut essen kann. Der Bahnhof liegt ebenfalls in der Stadt, von dort aus kann man direkt zum Fansipan fahren.

Insgesamt lässt sich vieles bequem zu Fuß erreichen – wir würden jederzeit wiederkommen!

We truly appreciate your comment about the location and understand it may be less convenient for older guests. Your feedback is valuable and helps us improve. We hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you again soon!

reviews.title: The best birthday I've ever had!
reviews.text: This hotel was the biggest most pleasant surprise of our stay here in SAPA. The staffs were extremely  helpful and polite and helped us with eveyrthing we needed and more!..the rooms were super clean, the bed super comfortable and the room was filled with everything you could ever need! My stay here was the best I've had in Vietnam we were even upgraded since it was my birthday and wedding anniversary.  I will come back here in a heartbeat! .. was treated like royalty!

reviews.title: Great budget stay
reviews.text: Best budget hotel in Sapa

reviews.title: Great short stay
reviews.text: We had one night at this hotel for an early departure from Sapa in the morning. It was spotless and had everything we needed.
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. reviews.title: Simple, good and clean!
reviews.text: Staff are friendly, approachable and very understanding! I requested for early check-in (at a chargeable fee), and they quickly checked if the room was ready. The amenities are all working well in the room, and the room is clean upon check-in. Water is provided for everyday and the housekeeping service is done quickly but with no compromise to the level of cleanliness. The location is a little of a walk from the main center (and is uphill) so it can be a little far but it is quiet and still has restaurants and marts nearby for a quick fix. I enjoyed my stay here and will definitely recommend!
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text:
Excellent hotel, it has the feel of a high end hotel but for a very reasonable price.
The beds and pillows are super comfy, there are plenty of amenities provided and there is even a TV with netflix.
If you book a room with a balcony there is a great view over the mountains in SaPa.
They offer a laundry service, and the staff are very friendly.
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: We reserved 2 rooms for 6.  Really impressed with the welcoming drink and fruit (a plate of banana). They have complete amenities like a 4 or 5 star hotel, have premium shampoo, conditioner, and handwash . Provide mirrors with lighting, TV, refrigerator, safe deposit box, hair dryer, and standing fan. Truly makes the stay very special with the service of herbal foot soak. Staff are helpful and accomodationg, always ready to assist us. Breakfast is covered with various range of food and delicious. Location is near city centre, has stunning beautiful view of mountains and nature, peaceful, and refreshing. We have the pleasant and comfortable staying and the price and quality of the hotel exceeded our expectations. Highly recommended!!!
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality

reviews.title: Best rating 3star hotel
reviews.text:
I now understand why this hotel is considered one of the best-rated 3-star hotels. The rooms are clean, and the toiletries are from well-known brands, which adds a nice touch. The breakfast is good… nothing spectacular, but enough to fill you up and start your day right.  

The location is very convenient, being close to Sun Plaza and the center of Sapa, so getting around was easy and hassle-free. The staff are also friendly and accommodating, which made the stay even more pleasant.  

I would definitely stay here again and highly recommend it to my friends.
reviews.response: We would like to take this opportunity to thank you for choosing A25 Hotel and sharing your feedback with us. We are happy to know that you had a pleasant stay with us on this trip. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back so we can serve you with all our hospitality

reviews.title: Stayed from March 3-6
reviews.text: Had a wonderful stay in A25 Hotel, the staff receptionist was warm and approachable with our concerns. We got the room with a balcony anyway... in transferring floors, had an elevator. So no worries with your luggages. Room is soooo comfy. Even the view. When the hairblower wasn't working bc my hair was soooo dry, when I asked from the reception, within 2mins, they have sent someone to aid our concern. The guards were very helping with our things and parking our rented motorcycle from the hotel. Even when we're departing, we received our tea drinks and we'll definitely come back again. We loved our whole Sapa trip bc we had a comfortable & amazing stay with A25.  The best!
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 

  

We would like to sincerely thank you for choosing to stay at A25 Hotel and for your wonderful feedback regarding your experience. We are especially grateful to receive your perfect 10/10 rating, which means a great deal to our entire team. 

  

We are delighted to know that you had a wonderful stay and were satisfied with the friendliness and dedication of our staff, especially our reception and security team. Providing prompt assistance and ensuring your comfort throughout your stay is always our top priority. 

  

We also truly appreciate your positive comments about the room’s comfort, facilities, and your overall experience at the hotel. 

  

However, we sincerely apologize that your room did not have a balcony as expected, as well as for theinconvenience caused by the hair dryer not working at the beginning of your stay. We are glad that the issue was resolved promptly, but we regret any inconvenience it may have caused.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: We need to switch hotels in the middle of the night because the first hotel that we booked had an issue.  HotelA25 accommodated us. The room are clean, tidy and smells nice. The staff are friendly and hospitable. This is our number 1 hotel in Sapa! Will surely come back!

reviews.title: A-Star Accommodation
reviews.text:
Nice little hotel located near town. Within walking distance to Sun Plaza Funicular Station..
Room was clean and comfortable. Friendly and helpful staff.

reviews.title: Good location while being in quiet surroundings
reviews.text:
Lily at time of checkin was lovely, even helped with bags to room. The room and bathroom was clean, toiletries provided, daily housekeeping. Only negative the first night was one oily pillowcase which needed changing but having booked a family room while there being only 2 of us, there was a spare third everything. The breakfast buffet is decent, and you can order fresh omelettes to be prepared. 
View wise it was foggy when we went so can't comment. Overall, it's a good hotel.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for choosing to stay at our hotel and for taking the time to share your experience after your stay. We are delighted to know that you were satisfied with the hotel’s convenient yet quiet location, as well as the cleanliness of the room and bathroom, the well-prepared amenities, and the daily housekeeping service. 

  

We also truly appreciate your kind compliments about our staff. The enthusiasm and attentiveness of our team are something we take great pride in, and we continuously strive to maintain these standards to provide the best possible experience for our guests. 

  

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconvenience regarding the pillowcase during your first night, which did not meet our hygiene standards. We have noted your feedback and will strengthen our inspection process during room preparation to ensure that our cleanliness standards are consistently maintained.
